title: NFT Transfer
description: An NFT transfer event representing a mint, transfer, or burn of an ERC-721 or ERC-1155 token.

transaction_hash.description: Hash of the transaction containing this transfer.

log_index.description: Index of the event log within the transaction.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the block that included this transfer.

contract_address.description: Contract address of the NFT collection.

token_id.description: The NFT token ID (as string to support large integers).

from_address.description: Sender address. Zero address (0x000...000) indicates a mint.

to_address.description: Recipient address. Zero address indicates a burn.

token_standard.description: The token standard governing this transfer.

quantity.description: Number of tokens transferred. Always 1 for ERC-721; may be >1 for ERC-1155.
